products.name: DRV Series™
products.descriptor: Airborne PCM telemetry data link system for UAVs

evidence.snippet:
DRV SERIES™
-----------
​
-
The Aero Telemetry DRV Series™ airborne PCM telemetry data link was designed specifically for use on Unmanned Air Vehicles. This entry level integrated air-flight data package provides UAV operators with a reliable and cost effective telemetry downlink.

*   Fully Integrated Airborne PCM Telemetry Data Link
*   Complete Air-Data Sensor Package
*   COTS/Non-Developmental Item

products.name: Cross-X Series™
products.descriptor: High-speed cruciform canopy flight termination parachute system

evidence.snippet: Aero Telemetry designs and manufactures flight termination and vehicle recovery parachute systems for many applications. The Cross-X Series™ of high-speed canopies are Commercial Off The Shelf stock items.

CROSS-X SERIES™ HIGH SPEED FLIGHT TERMINATION PARACHUTE SYSTEMS
![HPERX\_header.jpg](https://static.wixstatic.com/media/139de8_693b06fc89584369a4943ab02db77180~mv2.jpg/v1/crop/x_181,y_0,w_355,h_292/fill/w_385,h_316,al_c,lg_1,q_80,enc_avif,quality_auto/HPERX_header.jpg)
CROSS-X SERIES™
HIGH SPEED FLIGHT TERMINATION
PARACHUTE SYSTEMS
-------------------------------------------------------------------
​
-
REF: ANT-T-ESTA1

products.name: Antenna Systems
products.descriptor: Airborne and ground-station antennas for UHF/L/S-band UAV telemetry

evidence.snippet:
[OMNI-DIRECTIONAL BASE STATION ANTENNAS](https://www.aerotelemetry.com/antenna-systems)
*   UHF / LL / UL / S & C-Band Omni-Directional Data Antennas
*   400 - 500 MHz, Portable Base Station Antenna, 6.2dB Gain
*   Base Antenna 6dB Gain
​
[AIRBORNE INSTRUMENTATION](https://www.aerotelemetry.com/antenna-systems)
*   Miniature Airborne L/S-Band Blade Antenna
*   Airborne L/S-Band Blade Antenna
*   Airborne Broadband Flush-Mounted Antennas

2.2 - 2.4 GHZ, OMNI DIRECTIONAL DATA ANTENNA
--------------------------------------------
​
REF: ANT-OA-10\-S
*   2.2 to 2.4 GHz
*   2.4 to 2.5 GHz ISM / WiFi Band
*   N-Connector, 4 dB gain
*   Fiberglass radome, DC grounded

products.name: Airborne Voice Relay
products.descriptor: UAV-to-ATC voice relay for standard air traffic control frequencies

evidence.snippet:
[AIRBORNE VOICE RELAY](https://www.aerotelemetry.com/airborne-voice-relay)
--------------------------------------------------------------------------
Originally developed for the Predator UAV our  Airborne voice communication relay system is used to allow ATC personnel to communicate directly with the remote operator of the UAV on Standard commercial Air Traffic Frequencies.

products.name: Amplifiers
products.descriptor: RF power amplifiers for airborne and ground-based applications

evidence.snippet:
[AMPLIFIERS](https://www.aerotelemetry.com/copy-of-airborne-voice-relay)
------------------------------------------------------------------------
![3-bars-bullet-icon-wings-left.png](https://static.wixstatic.com/media/139de8_f8d84ef6f147494ab0cd79a22b48aa4f~mv2.png/v1/fill/w_51,h_20,al_c,q_85,usm_0.66_1.00_0.01,enc_avif,quality_auto/3-bars-bullet-icon-wings-left.png)

Aero Telemetry designs and manufactures RF power amplifiers for a wide variety of airborne and ground based applications.

products.name: UAV Landing Gear
products.descriptor: Hydraulically actuated retractable landing gear for unmanned air vehicles

evidence.snippet:
The most complex system on any airplane in the retractable landing gear.
Aero Telemetry has designed and manufactured hydraulically actuated  landing gear systems for several unique unmanned air vehicle projects for more than 25 years

products.name: P-15 Round Canopy Recovery Parachute System
products.descriptor: 15-foot round canopy parachute for slow-speed UAV vehicle recovery

evidence.snippet:
115 FOOT ROUND CANOPY RECOVERY PARACHUTE SYSTEM
REF: P-15
Vehicle recovery, slow speed deployment, round canopy parachute. Assembled 15' Main Parachute, deployment bag, risers, french links, & drogue chute.
$895

products.name: Active Drogue Chute (P-DRS)
products.descriptor: Spring-loaded active drogue chute accessory for rapid main canopy deployment

evidence.snippet:
ACTIVE DROGUE CHUTE
REF: P-DRS
Active Drogue Chute with riser and internal coil spring for fastest deployment.
$145

products.name: Passive Drogue Chute (P-DRP)
products.descriptor: Passive drogue chute accessory for main canopy deployment on UAV parachute systems

evidence.snippet:
PASSIVE DROGUE CHUTE
REF: P-DRP
Drogue Chute performance is critical to main canopy deployment. Passive Drogue Chute, riser and french links are included as optional items on all of the main canopies listed in this catalog.
$75

The DRV Series™ sub-models (DRV-1000, DRV-2000, DRV-3000, DRV-4000) are enumerated on resource-0005; they are grouped here as a family rather than individual SKUs.
